examples.title: Hamming Code Encoder
examples.description: Generates redundant bits for single-error correction
examples.code:
FUNCTION encode_hamming(data)
  r = calculate_red_bits(len(data))
  codeword = insert_parity_positions(data, r)
  FOR i IN 1 TO r:
    pos = 2^(i-1)
    parity = calculate_xor(codeword, coverage_bits(pos))
    SET codeword[pos] = parity
  RETURN codeword
examples.explanation: Inserts parity bits at power-of-two positions and calculates their values via XOR

examples.title: Checksum Calculator
examples.explanation: Sums words with carry wraparound and returns 1's complement
